
# List of running hubs

% NOTE: The tables on this page are generated by `docs/helper_programs/hub_info_table.py`, run as a build step (see .readthedocs.yaml).

Here's a list of running hubs and some statistics about them.
It is automatically generated from the config stored in the [`config/clusters` folder of the `infrastructure` repository](https://github.com/2i2c-org/infrastructure/tree/HEAD/config/clusters) and can therefore be limited in the information it provides.[^kubeconfig]

[^kubeconfig]:

    Hubs that have `kubeconfig` listed as their provider are a bit more bespoke, and harder to tie to a specific provider.
    Usually this either a public infrastructure provider like JetStream, but either way you should probably dig deeper in to the config to confirm.
